name: Albini Family Vineyards
seoDescription: Albini Family Vineyards — a tiny family-owned Windsor estate making about 500 cases a year of unfiltered, hand-bottled Russian River Valley Merlot and Zinfandel. By appointment.

hero.heading: Two wines, made entirely by hand
hero.subheading: A tiny Windsor estate winery producing about 500 cases of unfiltered, hand-bottled Merlot and Zinfandel each year.

images.heroAlt: Albini Family Vineyards in Windsor, CA

about.heading: The Albini Family
body: Albini Family Vineyards was established in 1991 by Don and Lynne Albini, who still run their small Windsor estate by hand. Although they are tiny by winery standards, their Merlot and Zinfandel have earned national attention for their quality and distinctive style.

Everything follows a natural, hands-on approach. Vineyard yields are kept low at two to three tons per acre, and all grapes are handpicked and sorted. Fermentation happens in small open-top fermenters using indigenous wild yeast, with the cap punched down three to four times a day before the wine is pressed in a half-ton basket press and hand-bucketed into barrels.

Don famously moves his wine with buckets rather than pumps, and has been known to sleep in the barn so he can hand-punch the fruit through the night. Both wines are unfiltered and hand-bottled at the estate — a no-frills, artisan winery where guests are walked through the whole operation by the winemaker himself.

services.title: Russian River Valley Merlot
services.description: Aged 20 months in a mix of French and American oak — a richer, more complex style with notes of dark berry, plum and spice. Unfiltered and hand-bottled.

services.title: Russian River Valley Zinfandel
services.description: 100% Zinfandel aged 18 to 20 months in primarily American oak. Bold and peppery with ripe red and black fruit and big tannins.

services.title: Library & Reserve Releases
services.description: Older library and reserve vintages of both the Merlot and Zinfandel are poured at the estate, offering a look at how the wines age.

services.title: Private Estate Tasting
services.description: By-appointment tastings where Don personally walks guests through the barn and the entire hands-on winemaking process. Reservations required.

items.quote: After seeing how hands-on Don is with his wine — walking through his tiny barn and watching everything done by hand — I have a deeper respect for him. No employees, just family, friends and volunteers.
items.author: Yelp reviewer

items.quote: Through word of mouth we visited for a private tasting and were delighted with the whole visit.
items.author: Yelp reviewer

items.a: You'll find us at 886 Jensen Ln.
We proudly serve Windsor, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at +17078389249 — we're glad to help.
